visual_description: A woman with shoulder-length brown hair lies in a hospital bed, covered by a pink blanket, looking upward. A man in a beige jacket leans over her, gesturing with his hand while looking at her. A woman in a white lab coat with a name tag stands nearby, looking down toward the bed.
audio_description: The audio features a female voice with a high pitch and moderate speed.
